requirements.text: Animation in absolute temperature mode displays interpolated daily mean temperature heatmap with cold-to-hot gradient legend in °F and calendar date
Animation in deviation mode displays temperature departure heatmap from 1991-2020 NOAA Climate Normal with diverging gradient, excluding stations without Climate Normal data
Date ranges exceeding 30 days trigger validation error 'Date range must be 30 days or fewer' and prevent animation load
Dates beyond 5 years in the past are disabled in date picker with note 'Data is available for the past 5 years only'
Unprocessed date ranges display 'No data available for this date range yet' and prevent animation load
Missing station readings trigger interpolation using available stations; grid cells with insufficient nearby coverage render with reduced opacity
Playback controls support play, pause, frame stepping, timeline scrubbing, speed selection (1/2/5/10 fps), with calendar date synchronized to current frame
Mode toggle switches visualization between absolute temperature and deviation modes with corresponding data and legends
